criteria.name: cleaning.py runs end-to-end without error
criteria.evidence: Pipeline materialize_resampled.py runs successfully; no cleaning.py exists (restructured). Pipeline completes for all stations.

criteria.name: All 6 stations have station_hourly.csv
criteria.evidence: Verified: all 6 station dirs contain station_hourly.csv.

criteria.name: All 6 stations have station_daily.csv
criteria.evidence: Verified: all 6 station dirs contain station_daily.csv.

criteria.name: Hourly CSVs have FWI columns
criteria.evidence: cavendish/station_hourly.csv has 11 columns — no FWI columns (ffmc, dmc, dc, isi, bui, fwi). All other 5 stations have FWI. The pipeline was re-run locally producing FWI data for cavendish, but the output files are dirty (uncommitted in working tree). Commit 7bfbc2a touched cavendish CSVs but the committed versions still lack FWI. Test fails deterministically (sorted iteration fix is correct).

criteria.name: Daily CSVs have FWI columns
criteria.evidence: cavendish/station_daily.csv has 11 columns — no FWI columns. Same root cause as AC-INT-4: uncommitted pipeline output.

criteria.name: Imputation runs after concat+dedup
criteria.evidence: Pipeline code applies imputation on concatenated hourly data, not per-file.

criteria.name: Long gaps remain NaN
criteria.evidence: Imputation report shows 'preserve' method for gaps exceeding limits.

criteria.name: FWI calculated on imputed data
criteria.evidence: cavendish has no FWI columns at all — FWI was never committed for this station. Downstream of AC-INT-4 failure.

summary: REJECT: Same root cause as previous review — cavendish is still missing all 6 FWI columns in both station_hourly.csv and station_daily.csv. Ralph re-ran the pipeline locally (dirty working tree shows cavendish CSVs with FWI) but failed to commit the regenerated outputs. Commit 7bfbc2a modified cavendish CSVs but the committed versions still have only 11 columns. The test fixes (sorted iteration, station column in daily CSVs) are correct and improve determinism, but do not address the core issue: Ralph must re-run the pipeline AND commit the resulting cavendish outputs with FWI columns. 2 tests fail, 7 pass.
